pr-evidence/cachet-vendor-engine-adapter.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Huygens initially blocked on SGLang version drift, then stale release-probe example pins, then Poetry resolver conflict from raw runtime extras; after fixes, Huygens approved with no findings.
verification: poetry install --dry-run -> passed after removing raw serving runtime extras
poetry build -> built sdist and wheel
installed-wheel smoke for cachet.adapters.vllm/cachet.adapters.sglang and vendored compatibility packages -> passed
gh pr checks 303 --watch -> Test and build passed
GPT-5.5 high-reasoning review by Huygens approved after SGLang pin and resolver findings were resolved
what_changed: Vendored vllm_kv_injection and sglang_kv_injection into the Cachet repository while preserving their existing import paths for launch/probe compatibility.
Added cachet.adapters.vllm and cachet.adapters.sglang aliases over the vendored compatibility packages.
Packaged adapter py.typed markers and copied/adapted the adapter tests into the Cachet suite without adding raw serving runtimes to Poetry extras.
pr-evidence/cachet-vendor-engine-adapter.why: Collapse the engine adapter source into the Cachet repo so users and release evidence start from one project surface while keeping runtime engine installs isolated and probe metadata stable.
